description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named lint-and-test that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have four ubuntu-latest jobs: lint-docs, lint-style, lint-typing, and test. The lint jobs should set up Python 3.12, install hatch, and run specific linting commands. The test job should use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, install hatch, and run tests with coverage.
